scripts.build:sdk: npm --prefix packages/trace-schema run build && npm --prefix packages/trace-sdk-ts run build && npm --prefix packages/instrumentation-openai-agents run build
scripts.test: node --import tsx scripts/test-detectors.ts && node --import tsx scripts/test-adapters.ts && node --import tsx scripts/test-instrumentation.ts && node --import tsx scripts/test-production.ts && node --import tsx scripts/test-sdk.ts
scripts.validate:sdk: npm run build:sdk && npm_config_cache=/tmp/agent-breach-npm-cache npm pack --workspace @agent-breach/trace-schema --dry-run && npm_config_cache=/tmp/agent-breach-npm-cache npm pack --workspace @agent-breach/replay --dry-run && npm_config_cache=/tmp/agent-breach-npm-cache npm pack --workspace @agent-breach/instrumentation-openai-agents --dry-run && npm run test:python-sdk && npm run test:python-instrumentation
